languages.text: 1-й Зарковский полк прославился на весь Простор, как элитные войска, воспитанные в суровых условиях, преданные и бесстрашные перед лицом смерти. Когда древние ксеносы некроны стали пробуждаться в своих гробницах, полк, уже сталкивавшийся с этим врагом, сыграл ключевую роль в обороне Простора. Гордо подняв знамя и запев Гимн Потерянных, десятки тысяч солдат отправились в неравный бой, чтобы обрести искупление.

The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.
languages.original_text: 1-й Зарковский полк прославился на весь Простор, как элитные войска, воспитанные в суровых условиях, преданные и бесстрашные перед лицом смерти. Когда древние ксеносы некроны стали пробуждаться в своих гробницах, полк, уже сталкивавшийся с этим врагом, сыграл ключевую роль в обороне Простора. The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

languages.text: 第一ザルコフ連隊は、過酷な環境の中で鍛え上げられ、忠実にして死を恐れぬ精鋭部隊として、エクスパンス全土にその名を轟かせた。古き異種族たるネクロンがその墳墓で目覚め始めたとき、かつて一度この敵と対峙したことのある連隊は、エクスパンスの防衛において決定的な役割を果たした。誇り高くその軍旗を掲げ、〈失われし者の聖歌〉を歌いながら、数万の兵士たちが贖罪を求めて勝ち目なき戦いへと進軍したのだった。
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: 第一ザルコフ連隊は、過酷な環境の中で鍛え上げられ、忠実にして死を恐れぬ精鋭部隊として、エクスパンス全土にその名を轟かせた。古き異種族たるネクロンがその墳墓で目覚め始めたとき、かつて一度この敵と対峙したことのある連隊は、エクスパンスの防衛において決定的な役割を果たした。誇り高くその軍旗を掲げ、〈失われし者の聖歌〉を歌いながら、数万の兵士たちが贖罪を求めて勝ち目なき戦いへと進軍したのだった。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫第一军团在整个扩区声名鹊起，他们忠诚且无畏死亡，是在严酷环境中锻造出的精锐部队。当墓穴中的远古异形太空死灵逐渐苏醒时，这支曾与其交战过的军团，在保卫扩区的战斗中发挥了决定性作用。数万名士兵自豪地高举旗帜，高唱着《迷失者赞歌》，投身一场力量悬殊的战斗，以寻求救赎。
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫第一军团在整个扩区声名鹊起，他们忠诚且无畏死亡，是在严酷环境中锻造出的精锐部队。当墓穴中的远古异形太空死灵逐渐苏醒时，这支曾与其交战过的军团，在保卫扩区的战斗中发挥了决定性作用。数万名士兵自豪地高举旗帜，高唱着《迷失者赞歌》，投身一场力量悬殊的战斗，以寻求救赎。

languages.text: 1. Zarkov Alayı; zorlu koşullarda savaşmaya alışmış, sadık ve ölüm karşısında korkusuz seçkin bir kuvvet olarak tüm Enginlik'te ün kazandı. Nekronlarla daha önce yüzlemiş olan alay, bu kadim zenolar mezarlarında uyanmaya başladığında Enginlik'in savunmasında belirleyici bir rol oynadı. Sancaklarını gururla kaldırıp Kayıpların İlahisi'ni söyleyen on binlerce asker, kefaret bulmak umuduyla taraflar arasında büyük bir güç farkı olan bir savaşa yürüdü.
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: 1. Zarkov Alayı; zorlu koşullarda savaşmaya alışmış, sadık ve ölüm karşısında korkusuz seçkin bir kuvvet olarak tüm Enginlik'te ün kazandı. Nekronlarla daha önce yüzlemiş olan alay, bu kadim zenolar mezarlarında uyanmaya başladığında Enginlik'in savunmasında belirleyici bir rol oynadı. Sancaklarını gururla kaldırıp Kayıpların İlahisi'ni söyleyen on binlerce asker, kefaret bulmak umuduyla taraflar arasında büyük bir güç farkı olan bir savaşa yürüdü.

languages.text: El Primer Regimiento de Zarkov se hizo célebre en toda la Extensión como una fuerza de élite forjada en las condiciones más extremas, leal e impávida ante la faz de la muerte. Cuando los vetustos Necrones comenzaron a despertar en sus tumbas, el regimiento, que ya se había enfrentado a aquel enemigo en el pasado, jugó un papel decisivo en la defensa de la Extensión. Alzando orgullosamente su estandarte y entonando el Himno de los Perdidos, decenas de miles de soldados marcharon a una batalla desigual con la esperanza de hallar la expiación.
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: El Primer Regimiento de Zarkov se hizo célebre en toda la Extensión como una fuerza de élite forjada en las condiciones más extremas, leal e impávida ante la faz de la muerte. Cuando los vetustos Necrones comenzaron a despertar en sus tumbas, el regimiento, que ya se había enfrentado a aquel enemigo en el pasado, jugó un papel decisivo en la defensa de la Extensión. Alzando orgullosamente su estandarte y entonando el Himno de los Perdidos, decenas de miles de soldados marcharon a una batalla desigual con la esperanza de hallar la expiación.

languages.text: Dans toutes les Étendues, on considéra alors le 1er régiment de Zarkov comme une force d'élite, forgée dans des conditions extrêmes, d'une loyauté à toute épreuve et inébranlable jusque devant la mort. Lorsque les antiques xénos surnommés Nécrons commencèrent à surgir de leurs tombeaux, le régiment, qui avait déjà affronté ce terrible ennemi par le passé, joua un rôle décisif dans la défense des Étendues. Brandissant fièrement leur bannière et chantant à tue-tête l'Hymne des égarés, des dizaines de milliers de soldats s'élancèrent dans une bataille perdue d'avance en quête d'expiation.
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: Dans toutes les Étendues, on considéra alors le 1er régiment de Zarkov comme une force d'élite, forgée dans des conditions extrêmes, d'une loyauté à toute épreuve et inébranlable jusque devant la mort. Lorsque les antiques xénos surnommés Nécrons commencèrent à surgir de leurs tombeaux, le régiment, qui avait déjà affronté ce terrible ennemi par le passé, joua un rôle décisif dans la défense des Étendues. Brandissant fièrement leur bannière et chantant à tue-tête l'Hymne des égarés, des dizaines de milliers de soldats s'élancèrent dans une bataille perdue d'avance en quête d'expiation.

Des gens aux quatre coins des Étendues de Koronus rêvaient de rejoindre les rangs des Meroviens, conscients que servir le 32e régiment était un moyen sûr d'avoir une meilleure vie. Mais les Zarkoviens n'acceptaient que les recrues qui souhaitaient sincèrement mettre leur vie au service de la dynastie et de ses sujets.

languages.text: Das erste Zarkov-Regiment erlangte in der gesamten Ausdehnung Bekanntheit als loyale Elitearmee, die im Angesicht des Todes furchtlos kämpfte. Als die Necrons in ihren Gräbern erwachten, spielte das Regiment, das sich den Xenos schon einmal gestellt hatte, eine entscheidende Rolle bei der Verteidigung der Ausdehnung. Mit stolzen Bannern und der Hymne der Verlorenen auf den Lippen marschierten zehntausende Soldaten in eine beispiellose Schlacht, um Erlösung zu finden.
languages.original_text: The 1st Zarkov Regiment became renowned throughout the Expanse as an elite force, forged in harsh conditions, loyal, and fearless in the face of death. When the ancient xenos, the Necrons, began to awaken in their tombs, the regiment, which had faced this foe once before, played a decisive role in the defence of the Expanse. Proudly raising their banner and singing the Hymn of the Lost, tens of thousands of soldiers marched into an unequal battle to find atonement.

traits.locale_text: Das erste Zarkov-Regiment erlangte in der gesamten Ausdehnung Bekanntheit als loyale Elitearmee, die im Angesicht des Todes furchtlos kämpfte. Als die Necrons in ihren Gräbern erwachten, spielte das Regiment, das sich den Xenos schon einmal gestellt hatte, eine entscheidende Rolle bei der Verteidigung der Ausdehnung. Mit stolzen Bannern und der Hymne der Verlorenen auf den Lippen marschierten zehntausende Soldaten in eine beispiellose Schlacht, um Erlösung zu finden.
